description: Zymego is a Swedish healthtech company focused on automating prior authorization and care coordination between healthcare providers and payers. Their platform streamlines the administrative processes around specialist referrals and treatment approvals, reducing delays in patient care and administrative burden on healthcare staff.
value_proposition: Digitalizes and automates prior authorization workflows to reduce processing time from days/weeks to hours, improving patient access to care while reducing administrative costs for both providers and payers.
traction: Deployed in multiple Swedish healthcare regions

key_learnings: Nordic healthcare systems provide strong reference market for prior auth automation
Integration with existing regional healthcare IT systems is critical
Multi-stakeholder platform connecting providers and payers
Focus on reducing care delays improves patient outcomes
similarities_to_varden: Focus on reducing delays in care
